representative_quotes: Retail thinks a 30-60% drop is a “falling knife” where bagholders will never recover. And they end up panic selling after seeing swiggly line TAs... I see it as long term ownership... At cheaper valuations.

representative_quotes: 存储起来，说明ai未来光明，其他概念才有机会，才值得抄底
